final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing avatar for a tech/lifestyle content creator.

Style/medium: needs a clean, modern, universally appealing aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: framing is yours
Subject: must include visual elements suggesting new energy vehicles, digital products, and lifestyle goods
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a friendly, professional atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a neutral-to-warm direction suitable for global platforms — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must avoid culturally sensitive symbols, religious imagery, or region-specific iconography that could offend; must be visually harmonious across Chinese and international social platforms
Avoid: must avoid religious symbols, political imagery, culturally specific gestures, or region-exclusive visual cues
